justification: DCAT W3C rec ships every term with nine language-tagged rdfs:label values (en, fr, es, it, ja, ar, da, el, ko). ROBOT flags any entity with > 1 label per language pair of (entity × language) — DCAT is structurally incompatible with ROBOT's multiple_labels rule. Upstream-only.

Cross-namespace label collision between DCAT terms and project concept-scheme terms (e.g. dcat:temporalResolution vs ei:concept/temporal-resolution). Labels are semantically appropriate in both namespaces; project term IRIs disambiguate.

V1 — same APOLLO_SV cross-namespace collision class as the /count row above; the OEO+IAO+APOLLO closure ships english labels for the agg-type concepts ("maximum", "minimum", scheme root) that match the project's prefLabel-derived rdfs:label. Project disambiguates via IRI.

V1 — QUDT 2.1 vocab/quantitykind ships rdfs:label values that collide with one another (e.g., "Power"@en duplicated via skos:exactMatch chains within the QUDT subset). Upstream W3C/QUDT rec; project does not author these labels.

V1 — QUDT 2.1 ships multiple rdfs:label values per QuantityKind by design (label + skos:altLabel + multilingual text). ROBOT's multiple_labels rule flags this as ERROR; QUDT W3C-aligned upstream practice. Project does not author.

V1 — QUDT 2.1 ships every Unit with multilingual rdfs:label values (en, de, fr, ja, etc., plus dcterms:description in LaTeX). ROBOT's multiple_labels rule fires once per language pair; structurally correct upstream behaviour.

V1 — OEO 2.11.0 occasionally ships duplicate rdfs:label values across closely-related classes (energy-supply / energy-demand / energy-flow patterns that share a "supply"@en label root). Upstream OEO; not authored by energy-intel.
V1 — OEO 2.11.0 occasionally ships multiple rdfs:label values per class (English + alt-label or German). Upstream OEO; not authored by energy-intel.
V1 — OEO 2.11.0 ships duplicate IAO:0000115 definitions on a few classes (e.g., OEO_00010061, OEO_00410061) due to the upstream merge of OEO + ENVO definitions. Project does not author OEO classes.
V1 — IAO ships duplicate definitions on annotation properties (IAO:0000010, IAO:0000027) due to original-IAO + obo-foundry merge. Upstream OBO pattern.
V1 — UO (Units of Measurement Ontology) ships duplicate IAO:0000115 definitions; transitively imported via OEO->IAO->UO chain. Upstream OBO pattern.
V1 — rdf:PlainLiteral has no rdfs:label by design (built-in RDF datatype, not an ontology class). Surfaces because OEO + QUDT mention it. Upstream W3C.
